name: STINGRAY INVENTORY SYSTEM (T-Dongle S3)
summary: WiFi-hosted inventory system for the LILYGO T-Dongle S3 with SD-backed storage, QR item pages, Google backup hooks, and onboard status notifications.
notes: Use Chrome or Microsoft Edge on a desktop or laptop.
Use a USB data cable and close any serial monitor before flashing.
Target device: LILYGO T-Dongle S3 with the current inventory firmware build.

name: STINGRAY INVENTORY DESKTOP (Windows Installer)
summary: One-click Windows installer for Stingray Inventory with SD-compatible data, Stingray-branded desktop shortcut, LAN access, and startup crash restart.
notes: Extract the zip and run: Install Inventory.cmd
Windows will prompt for Administrator approval (UAC).
Installs as a SYSTEM startup task and restarts after crashes by default.
Settings can turn Auto run and crash restart off on test PCs.
Creates a Windows Firewall rule for TCP 8787 on Private/Public network profiles.

name: AIRSOFT ENERGY INDICATOR (battery meter)
summary: Firmware for the Stingray airsoft energy indicator battery meter.
notes: Use Chrome or Microsoft Edge on a desktop or laptop.
Use a USB data cable, not a charge-only cable.
Close any serial monitor or IDE window before flashing.

name: STINGRAY CHRONOGRAPH (XIAO ESP32-C3)
summary: Chronograph firmware for the XIAO ESP32-C3 with dual-gate shot timing, local AP web UI, velocity metrics, and printable report support.
notes: Use Chrome or Microsoft Edge on a desktop or laptop.
Use a USB data cable and close any serial monitor before flashing.
Target device: Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32-C3 running the Stingray Chronograph build.
